message:
Add comprehensive SEO and social sharing support

OpenGraph and Twitter card images:
- Dynamic OG image generation with gradient background
- Branded text with site title and tagline
- Twitter card image generation matching OG format

Structured data (JSON-LD):
- WebSite schema with site name, URL, description
- Author information with Jeffrey Emanuel attribution
- SearchAction for sitelinks search box
- ItemList for featured prompts

Sitemap and robots:
- next-sitemap configuration for automatic sitemap generation
- robots.txt allowing all crawlers
- Sitemap includes all prompt pages and routes

Layout metadata improvements:
- Enhanced viewport configuration
- Apple touch icon support
- Theme color meta tags

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
